reviews.review_msg: Devan is at the U of A now in the political science department but I can hands down say he is the best TA I have ever had. He has clear expectations for us and comes up with fun ways of engaging with the readings.
Amazing TA who goes above and beyond for every student. For the final exam he had drop-in office hours for over 5 hours! Really respect him and hope to have him as a TA in the future.
Class with Devan feels more like a fashion show than actual class, but he really cares about students and it's easy to make office hours with him and figure out what to do.
